name: copilot-usage-insights-tracker
description: Track GitHub Copilot Chat token usage, AI credit costs, and tool calls — per message and per session, right inside VS Code.

viewsWelcome.contents:
Set `github.copilot.chat.agentDebugLog.fileLogging.enabled` to **true**, then start a new Copilot Chat session.

[Open Setting](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22github.copilot.chat.agentDebugLog.fileLogging.enabled%22)

chatParticipants.name: usage
chatParticipants.description: Analyze Copilot chat session data — costs, tool calls, commands, patterns. Ask about any session.

languageModelTools.name: usage-search-sessions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search recent Copilot Chat sessions by keyword (supports multiple words as OR match). Always returns the last 2 days of sessions as a safety net alongside search results. Use this FIRST before usage-get-graph unless the user explicitly says 'this session' or 'the current one'. Returns session IDs you can pass to usage-get-graph.

query.description: Keywords to match against session titles (space-separated, OR match — any word matching counts). Like a wildcard search.

daysBack.description: How many days back to search (default: 3)

languageModelTools.name: usage-get-graph
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the full data graph for a Copilot Chat session. Returns stats, messages, tool calls, commands, and costs. Omit sessionId only when the user says 'this session' or 'the loaded one'. Otherwise call usage-search-sessions first to get the correct session ID. Analyze the returned data for risks, patterns, waste, repeated terminal commands, and tool usage.

sessionId.description: Session ID (or prefix) to load. Omit for the current session.

copilotUsageTracker.searchRoots.description: Additional directories to scan for Copilot/VS Code chat debug logs. Use absolute paths.

copilotUsageTracker.maxSearchDepth.description: Maximum recursion depth when scanning configured and default log roots.

copilotUsageTracker.serverUrl.description: Base URL of the Copilot Usage server (e.g. http://localhost:8000). Leave empty to disable session reporting. Stored in user settings so it is available in Remote-SSH sessions.

copilotUsageTracker.userId.description: Override the user identifier sent to the server. Leave empty to use the signed-in GitHub account name (or OS username as fallback).

copilotUsageTracker.monthlyCreditLimit.description: Maximum AI Credits (AIC) budget for the current calendar month. Drives the 'AI Credit Usage Meter' shown at the top of the Token Usage view.

copilotUsageTracker.cliSearchRoots.description: Directories to scan for local Copilot CLI usage logs (.jsonl files). Only files in the specified directories are scanned — sub-directories named 'copilot-cli' or 'gh-copilot' are also discovered recursively up to maxSearchDepth. No data is sent from these paths unless server reporting is explicitly enabled.

copilotUsageTracker.agentSearchRoots.description: Directories to scan for local Copilot Agent run logs (.jsonl files). Only files in the specified directories are scanned — sub-directories named 'copilot-agent' or 'agent-runs' are also discovered recursively up to maxSearchDepth. No data is sent from these paths unless server reporting is explicitly enabled.
